html:
Exclusive to:

The Feathery Canvas is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Refined Materials Filter and is prototyped at the Alchemy Engine. It requires six Malbatross Feathers and one piece of Silk to craft. Four Feathery Canvases are required to craft the Winged Sail.

Usage

×4

×3

×3

Trivia

  • Feathery Canvas was introduced in the Salty Dog update.
  • The blueprint requirement was replaced with prototyping in the March 2022 QoL update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“I'm making a quill-t!”
–Wilson
“That took way too much effort.”
–Willow
“Is cloth of bird!”
–Wolfgang
“My fingers ache from sewing in all those feathers.”
–Wendy
“FEATHERS ADDED FOR INCREASED EFFICIENCY”
–WX-78
“A sturdy, lightweight material.”
–Wickerbottom
“Why'd we go and ruin this perfectly good canvas?”
–Woodie
“Hopefully it catches the wind as well as the eye.”
–Maxwell
“A bölt öf thine finest bird-clöth!”
–Wigfrid
“We used our nicest spider silk!”
–Webber
“This fabric is light as a feather!”
–Warly
“Feather cloth”
–Wormwood
“Now that's some fancy fabric.”
–Winona
“This fabric tickles, hyuyu.”
–Wortox
“Made from bird!”
–Wurt
“I didn't know you could make fabric out of feathers!”
–Walter
“Fabric from feathers, what will they think of next?”
–Wanda
The Feathery Canvas is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Refined Materials Filter and is prototyped at the Alchemy Engine. It requires six Malbatross Feathers and one piece of Silk to craft. Four Feathery Canvases are required to craft the Winged Sail.

The blueprint requirement was replaced with prototyping in the March 2022 QoL update.

title: Feathery Canvas

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}

|icon = Feathery Canvas.png

|description = A fine feathered fabric.
|canBeBurned=1

The '''Feathery Canvas''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is found in the [[Refined Materials Filter]] and is prototyped at the [[Alchemy Engine]]. It requires six [[Malbatross Feather]]s and one piece of [[Silk]] to craft. Four Feathery Canvases are required to craft the [[Winged Sail]].

=={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Feathery Canvas
|count1 = 4
|item2 = Driftwood Piece
|comparator2 = ×
|count2 = 3
|item3 = Rope
|comparator3 = ×
|count3 = 3
|result = Winged Sail
|tool = Think Tank}}
{{Clear}}
== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Feathery Canvas was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Salty Dog|Salty Dog]]'' update.
* The blueprint requirement was replaced with prototyping in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 24, 2022 - March 2022 QoL Update|March 2022 QoL update]].
